summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Hispaloshop Add to Cart fix. All critical flows working correctly - login, add to cart, cart display, and session persistence.
passed_tests: Add to Cart button on product detail page - SUCCESS (shows success toast)
Cart page displays added items correctly - SUCCESS
Session persistence after page refresh - SUCCESS
Cart count in header updates when items added - SUCCESS
Cookie-based authentication working with secure=True, samesite=none - SUCCESS
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user and products (prod_7889643617d1, prod_8eb6256e409d, prod_a761669eb3ed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Add to Cart functionality is fully working. The fix involved changing cookie settings in server.py from secure=False/samesite='lax' to secure=True/samesite='none' for cross-origin cookie support over HTTPS. All e-commerce flows (login, add to cart, view cart, session persistence) are working correctly.

verified_fix_details.issue: Add to Cart button was not working from UI
verified_fix_details.root_cause: Cookie/CORS configuration - cookies were not being sent cross-origin
verified_fix_details.fix_applied: Changed cookie settings: secure=True, samesite='none', httponly=False
verified_fix_details.verification: Tested via Playwright - Add to Cart shows success toast, cart updates correctly
